name: Chicken and Chive Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground chicken, beef, or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice cabbage coarsely and add to blender. Add water to cover cabbage. Cover and blend on high for 2 seconds. Drain and repeat until all cabbage is shredded. Squeeze cabbage to remove moisture.
2. Blanch, rinse, and finely chop chives.
3. Combine cabbage, chives, chicken, salt, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a bowl; mix well.
4. Place 1 tablespoon of filling in the center of each dumpling wrapper.
5. Fold the wrapper over the filling and seal the edges.
6. Bring water to a boil in a pot. Add dumplings and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Rinse dumplings under cold water to prevent them from sticking together.
8. Serve with soy sauce, vinegar, and ginger root slivers. Makes 4 servings.
